seo_title: France Choropleth Map – Regions & Regional Data | Regionify
seo_description: Explore France's 13 metropolitan regions with an interactive choropleth map. Visualize GDP per capita, population, and economic data by administrative region. Create custom maps with Regionify.
seo_keywords: France choropleth map, French regions map, France administrative divisions, France regional GDP map, Eurostat France, France economic map
intro_text: France is the largest country in the European Union by area, divided since 2016 into 13 metropolitan regions on the mainland plus 5 overseas regions. Economic output is heavily concentrated in Île-de-France, home to Paris and the greater metropolitan area, while regions such as Normandie, Grand Est, and Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes anchor industrial and agri­cultural output. Choropleth maps reveal these stark regional contrasts in GDP, population, and development.
